name: Risk Management
purpose: The purpose is to Regularly identify, analyze, treat and monitor process related risks and product related risks.

outcomes.text: The sources of risks are identified and regularly updated.
Potential undesirable events are identified as they develop during the conduct of the project.
Risks are analyzed and the priority in which to apply resources to treatment of these risks is determined.
Risk measures are defined, applied, and assessed to determine changes in the status of risk
Appropriate treatment is taken to correct or avoid the impact of risk based on its priority, probability, and consequence or other defined risk threshold.

basePractices.title: Identify sources of risks
basePractices.description: Identify and regularly update the sources of risks with affected parties.

basePractices.title: Identify potential undesirable events
basePractices.description: Identify potential undesirable events within the scope of the risk management for the project.

basePractices.title: Determine risks
basePractices.description: Determine the probability and severity of the undesirable events to support priorities for the mitigation of the risks. functional analysis, simulation, FMEA, FTA etc.

basePractices.title: Define risk treatment options
basePractices.description: For each risk select a treatment option to accept, mitigate, avoid, or share (transfer) the risk.

basePractices.title: Define and perform risk treatment activities
basePractices.description: Define and perform risk activities for risk treatment options.

basePractices.title: Monitor risks
basePractices.description: Regularly re-evaluate the risk related to the identified potential undesirable events to determine changes in the status of a risk and to evaluate the progress of the risk treatment activities. management.

basePractices.title: Take corrective action
basePractices.description: When risk treatment activities are not effective, take appropriate corrective action. mitigation concepts or adjusting the existing concepts. MAN.5 Risk Management 1 emoctuO 2 emoctuO 3 emoctuO 4 emoctuO 5 emoctuO
